zh.Wyck Rissington, Gloucestershire, Englan: 英國格盧斯特斯爾維可 利辛頓

zh-hans.Wyck Rissington, Gloucestershire, Englan: 英国格盧斯特斯爾維可 利辛頓

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bothe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Detlef, Manfred, Wolfgang.
North German and Dutch: from the North German personal name Bodo (see Bode 2).

variants.name: Bode
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Otto, Gerd, Gerhard, Helmut, Armin, Dieter, Erna, Ewald, Friedhelm, Fritz, Gunter.
Dutch and German: occupational name for a messenger or representative, Dutch bode, Middle Low German bode. A bode was a medieval official with a variety of different functions.
German and Danish: from the North German personal name Bodo, a derivative of Old Saxon bodo ‘messenger, leader’.

variants.name: Bottemiller
meanings: Americanized form of a German surname, probably North German Bottemöller, of which the second element (Middle Low German möller) means ‘miller’ and the first one is perhaps a variant of the personal name Bothe . The surname Bottemöller is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Both
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Johann, Otto, Ulrich, Wilhelm.
North German and Dutch: variant of   Bothe  .

Hungarian: variant of Bot, from the old personal name Bot or from the vocabulary word bot ‘stick’, probably applied as a metonymic occupational name for a shepherd or a village guard. This surname is also found in Slovakia.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard De Bothe was born in 1390, in Wyck Rissington, Gloucestershire, England. He had at least 1 daughter. He died after 1411.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard De Bothe est né en 1390, à Wyck Rissington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1411.

de.lifeSummary: Richard De Bothe wurde 1390 in Wyck Rissington, Gloucestershire, England geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1411.

it.lifeSummary: Richard De Bothe è nato il nel 1390 nel Wyck Rissington, Gloucestershire, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1411.

ja.Wyck Rissington, Gloucestershire, Englan: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウイック リシントン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Botheは1390年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウイック リシントンで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1411年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Bothe(은)는 1390년 영국 그루스스터실르 윈이c크 리징턴에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1411년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard De Bothe nasceu em 1390, em Wyck Rissington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1411.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard De Bothe родился в 1390 г. в местности викк риссингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер после 1411 г.

es.lifeSummary: Richard De Bothe nació en 1390, en Wyck Rissington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió después de 1411.

th.Wyck Rissington, Gloucestershire, Englan: เดยก ริสสอิงโทะน, โกลอูสส์ตร์รชิเร, เอิงแลนด์
